allow: PowerShell(docker compose exec -T django python -c "import os,unfold; d=os.path.dirname\(unfold.__file__\); [print\(os.path.join\(r,f\)\) for r,_,fs in os.walk\(d\) for f in fs if f.endswith\('.html'\) and 'language_switch' in open\(os.path.join\(r,f\),encoding='utf-8',errors='ignore'\).read\(\)]")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T django python -c "import os,unfold; d=os.path.dirname\(unfold.__file__\); p=os.path.join\(d,'templates/unfold/helpers/navigation_user.html'\); s=open\(p,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\).splitlines\(\); [print\(i+1,l.rstrip\(\)\) for i,l in enumerate\(s\) if 'language_switch' in l or 'show_languages' in l.lower\(\) or 'include' in l]")

PowerShell($env:SECRET_KEY="ci-test"; Set-Location "D:\\Django Projects\\PrepGenius_Proj\\prepgenius\\backend"; Copy-Item schema.yml schema_first.yml; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py spectacular --file schema.yml 2>$null; "=== idempotent? \(empty = in sync with code\) ==="; if \(\(Get-FileHash schema.yml\).Hash -eq \(Get-FileHash schema_first.yml\).Hash\) { "SCHEMA STABLE: regeneration is idempotent" } else { "SCHEMA DRIFT between regenerations" }; Remove-Item schema_first.yml, schema.yml.bak -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($env:SECRET_KEY="ci-test"; Set-Location "D:\\Django Projects\\PrepGenius_Proj\\prepgenius\\backend"; "=== drift \(PH-3 adds no model fields\) ==="; echo "" | .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py makemigrations --check --dry-run --settings=config.settings.test 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; "=== schema idempotent \(no contract change\) ==="; Copy-Item schema.yml _s.yml; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py spectacular --file schema.yml 2>$null; if \(\(Get-FileHash schema.yml\).Hash -eq \(Get-FileHash _s.yml\).Hash\) {"SCHEMA UNCHANGED"} else {"SCHEMA CHANGED"}; Remove-Item _s.yml; "=== questions + content_review suites ==="; $env:SECRET_KEY="ci-test-secret-key-not-used-in-production"; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest questions/ content_review/ -q -p no:warnings 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)
